direction.description: Resolver cache insertion must preserve authority, bailiwick, and request relevance.

spec_ref.section: Resolver answer processing and cache insertion
spec_ref.quote_or_summary: Exact normative source set requires CVE review with ISC advisory and relevant DNS BCP/RFC material.

statement: Resolver cache insertion must preserve bailiwick and request relevance; forged, unsolicited, or out-of-scope RR data must not be inserted as trusted cache data.
condition: A resolver processes an answer, authority, or additional-section RR set from an upstream response.
expected_behavior: The resolver validates that cached data is relevant and trustworthy for the query/authority context.
violation_pattern: The resolver accepts forged or extraneous answer data into cache where it can influence later resolutions.

review.review_notes: Strong but complex seed. Needs RFC/BCP/ISC advisory mapping before validation.
